entityName: Saekano: How to Raise a Boring Girlfriend .flat

metadata.entityName: Saekano: How to Raise a Boring Girlfriend .flat

ingredients.name: Shakey's Ikebukuro East
ingredients.localName: シェーキーズ 池袋東口店
ingredients.address: 大和ビル Ｂ1Ｆ, 1 Chome-11-4 Higashiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The circle's Ikebukuro outing in episode 2 takes them past this pizza chain, capturing the everyday commercial strip where Tomoya and the girls browse between errands.

ingredients.name: JUNKUDO Ikebukuro
ingredients.localName: ジュンク堂書店 池袋本店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-15-5 Minamiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The sprawling Junkudo bookstore in Ikebukuro appears as a destination for the circle in episode 2, where the characters browse manga and reference materials for their game project.

ingredients.name: Theater Mixa
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒170-0013 Tokyo, Toshima City, Higashiikebukuro, 1 Chome−14−3 6階
ingredients.entityContext: This performing arts venue near Higashi-Ikebukuro is depicted in episode 2 as part of the cast's outing in the neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Sweets Design Studio MAPRIL
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒167-0042 Tokyo, Suginami City, Nishiogikita, 3 Chome−38−16
ingredients.entityContext: The Nishi-Ogikubo cake shop appears in episode 5, providing the backdrop for a relaxed meeting between characters away from the usual Ikebukuro haunts.

ingredients.name: Hilton Tokyo Odaiba
ingredients.localName: ヒルトン東京お台場
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-9-1 Daiba, Minato City, Tokyo 135-8625, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Hilton Odaiba features in the OVA episode as the luxurious seaside hotel where the circle gathers, giving Megumi and Tomoya an unusually formal setting for their conversations.

ingredients.name: Near the Tokyo Big Sight Higashito
ingredients.localName: 東京ビッグサイト東棟前付近
ingredients.address: 3-chōme-7 Ariake, Koto City, Tokyo 135-0063, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The plaza in front of Tokyo Big Sight's East Hall stands in for the Comiket venue exterior in episode 6, where the circle arrives to sell their doujin game and Tomoya anxiously checks the queue.

ingredients.name: Tully's Coffee Otsuka
ingredients.localName: タリーズコーヒー 大塚店
ingredients.type: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
categories: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
ingredients.address: 今井三菱ビル 1F, 3 Chome-53-11 Minamiotsuka, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0005, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Otsuka branch of Tully's appears in episode 7 as a casual meeting spot along the Toden streetcar route that Tomoya and a heroine use for a quiet discussion.

ingredients.name: Statue of Liberty
ingredients.localName: 自由の女神像
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-4-2 Daiba, Minato City, Tokyo 135-0091, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Odaiba replica Statue of Liberty serves as a recognizable landmark backdrop during the OVA episode, visible as characters stroll along the waterfront near Daiba.

ingredients.name: Komeda Coffee Shop Hotani
ingredients.localName: コメダ珈琲店 保谷店
ingredients.type: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
categories: コーヒーショップ・喫茶店
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-1-19 Fujimachi, Nishitokyo, Tokyo 202-0014, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Hotani Komeda in western Tokyo appears in episode 5 as a comfortable family-restaurant-style cafe where characters hold a low-key planning session for the circle.

ingredients.name: Sanrio Gift Gate
ingredients.localName: Sanrio 池袋店
ingredients.address: ヤンズビル 1F・2F, 1 Chome-12-10 Higashiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Sanrio shop near Higashi-Ikebukuro is part of the episode 2 Ikebukuro shopping circuit, glimpsed as the group passes through the commercial district.

ingredients.name: Sekiguchi Sanchome Park
ingredients.localName: 関口三丁目公園
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-2 Sekiguchi, Bunkyo City, Tokyo 112-0014, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This small neighborhood park in Bunkyo appears in episode 3, where Tomoya and Megumi share an understated moment during a walk, reflecting the series' habit of grounding emotional scenes in ordinary residential spaces.

ingredients.name: Near the City Terrace Mejiro
ingredients.localName: シティテラス目白付近
ingredients.address: 2-chōme-16 Takada, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0033, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The residential street near the City Terrace Mejiro apartment complex appears in episode 8, representing the quiet Mejiro neighborhood associated with Megumi's understated presence in Tomoya's life.

ingredients.name: Tokyo Big Sight West Hall 4
ingredients.localName: 東京ビッグサイト西４ホール
ingredients.type: コンベンション センター
categories: コンベンション センター
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒135-0063 Tokyo, Koto City, Ariake, 3 Chome−11−1, 東京国際展示場西展示棟4F
ingredients.entityContext: The West Hall of Tokyo Big Sight is depicted as the interior of the Comiket venue in episode 6, where Field Craft's booth draws a crowd and the circle experiences the high-pressure reality of doujin game sales.

ingredients.name: Waseda Station
ingredients.localName: 早稲田駅（都電）
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-23 Nishiwaseda, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 169-0051, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Toden Arakawa line's Waseda stop appears in episode 7 as part of the retro streetcar journey that gives a character some time to reflect away from the group.

ingredients.name: Toden-Zoshigaya Station
ingredients.localName: 都電雑司ヶ谷駅
ingredients.address: 4-chōme-11 Minamiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The charming Toden Zoshigaya tram stop appears in episode 3, used as a quiet transit point on the old-fashioned streetcar line that threads through the Ikebukuro area's residential side streets.

ingredients.name: Tsubakiya coffee shop Ikebukuro Saryo
ingredients.localName: 椿屋珈琲 池袋茶寮
ingredients.address: Itou Building, B1, 1 Chome-6-4 Higashiikebukuro, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This upscale Japanese cafe in Ikebukuro appears in episode 2, where the refined setting contrasts with the characters' otaku-circuit errands and provides a more composed atmosphere for conversation.

ingredients.name: Daiba Station
ingredients.localName: 台場駅
ingredients.address: 2-chōme-6 Daiba, Minato City, Tokyo 135-0091, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yurikamome line's Daiba Station serves as the arrival point during the OVA episode set in Odaiba, where characters disembark for the beachside gathering at the Hilton.

ingredients.name: Nozokizaka
ingredients.localName: のぞき坂
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-12-21 Takada, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0033, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This dramatically steep slope in Mejiro is a documented pilgrimage spot for Saekano fans, appearing in episode 2 as the incline near Megumi's neighborhood that Tomoya climbs, reinforcing the series' association of her character with this quiet, residential part of Tokyo.

ingredients.name: Mitsui Outlet Park Iruma
ingredients.localName: 三井アウトレットパーク 入間
ingredients.address: 3169-1 Miyadera, Iruma, Saitama 358-8515, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Iruma outlet mall in Saitama appears in episode 11 as a destination for a rare out-of-town outing, where the characters shop and the relaxed environment allows for more personal exchanges before the final push on the game.

ingredients.name: Gakushuinshita Station
ingredients.localName: 学習院下駅
ingredients.address: 7, Toshima City, Tokyo 171-0033, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Toden streetcar stop at Gakushuinshita appears in episode 4 as a transit point along the line, used in a scene that emphasizes the unhurried, slice-of-life pace of movement through the city.

ingredients.name: Otani Museum
ingredients.localName: 旧古河邸 大谷美術館
ingredients.address: 旧古河庭園 内, 1 Chome-27-39 Nishigahara, Kita City, Tokyo 114-0024, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Kyu-Furukawa Gardens estate and its Otani Museum building appear in episode 3, providing a Western-style garden setting for a meeting scene that carries romantic undertones as Tomoya and a heroine walk through the rose garden.

ingredients.name: Otsukaekimae Station
ingredients.localName: 大塚駅前駅
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-33-1 Minamiotsuka, Toshima City, Tokyo 170-0005, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Toden streetcar terminal at Otsuka appears in episode 7 as the end point of the retro tram line, used as a transition moment in a scene where characters part ways after their coffee shop meeting.

ingredients.name: Kaneasue JR Ikebukuro Station North ticket gate
ingredients.localName: かねすえJR池袋駅北改札店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒171-0022 Tokyo, Toshima City, 1 Chome−1, 豊島区南池袋１－２８－２ 池袋駅Ｂ１Ｆ＿北改札外
ingredients.entityContext: The Japanese confectionery stall at JR Ikebukuro Station's North ticket gate appears in episode 2, a fleeting stop during the circle's Ikebukuro outing that grounds the episode in the daily rhythms of the station concourse.

ingredients.name: Gusto Wako-shi Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: ガスト 和光市駅前店
ingredients.type: ファミリー レストラン
categories: ファミリー レストラン
ingredients.address: Town Court Excel, １階, 3-13 Honcho, Wako, Saitama 351-0114, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Gusto family restaurant near Wako Station in Saitama appears in episode 1 as an early gathering spot for the circle, setting up the low-key suburban mood of the early meetings before Comiket planning intensifies.

ingredients.name: Akebono Bridge
ingredients.localName: 曙橋
ingredients.address: 7 Sumiyoshichō, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 162-0065, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Akebonobashi area in Shinjuku appears in episode 9, used as a street-level location during a tense conversation scene that marks a turning point in the story's interpersonal dynamics.

ingredients.name: Hatoba Park
ingredients.localName: はとば公園
ingredients.address: 6 Chome-19-24 Tsukiji, Chuo City, Tokyo 104-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hatoba Park along the Tsukiji waterfront appears in episode 10, providing a riverside setting for a reflective scene as the circle's project nears completion and characters take stock of where they stand.
